Divine Shrines[]

The divine shrines require a shrine base before they can be crafted.

Item Sawn Log Quarried Stone Clay
Shrine Base 1 2 2

Per Shrine[]

Shrine of Akatosh[]

Magicka regenerates 10% faster

  • 1 x Amulet of Akatosh
  • 1 x Iron Ingot
  • 1 x Flawless Amethyst
  • 1 x Corundum Ingot

Shrine of Arkay[]

Increases Health by 25 pts

  • 1 x Amulet of Arkay
  • 1 x Orichalcum Ingot
  • 1 x Silver Ingot
  • 1 x Iron Ingot

Shrine of Dibella[]

Adds +10 to Speech

  • 1 x Amulet of Dibella
  • 1 x Iron Ingot
  • 1 x Orichalcum Ingot
  • 1 x Quicksilver Ingot

Shrine of Julianos[]

Increases Magicka by 25 pts

  • 1 x Amulet of Julianos
  • 2 x Ebony Ingot

Shrine of Kynareth[]

Increases Stamina by 25 pts

  • 1 x Amulet of Kynareth
  • 2 x Refined Moonstone
  • 1 x Flawless Sapphire

Shrine of Mara[]

Fortify Restoration by 10%

  • 1 x Amulet of Mara
  • 1 x Silver Ingot
  • 2 x Refined Malachite

Shrine of Stendarr[]

Block 10% more damage with your shield

  • 1 x Amulet of Stendarr
  • 1 x Quicksilver Ingot
  • 1 x Steel Ingot
  • 2 x Silver Ingot

Shrine of Talos[]

Reduce time between shouts by 20%

  • 1 x Amulet of Talos
  • 1 x Steel Ingot
  • 1 x Dragon Bone
  • 1 x Dragon Scales

Shrine of Zenithar[]

Prices are 10% better

  • 1 x Amulet of Zenithar
  • 1 x Steel Ingot
  • 2 x Gold Ingot
